name: AngleSlider
visual_summary: The AngleSlider component is a customizable slider that measures angles and can be used to set values within a defined range.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready slider component with the following characteristics:

Name: AngleSlider
Description: The AngleSlider component is a customizable slider that measures angles and can be used to set values within a defined range.
Style: e.g. modern, light, customizable
Interactions: e.g. draggable, clickable, value-updatable
Tags: slider, form, interactive

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
